title: Image To Image Naive Digital Selfie Avatar AI
sourceTitle: Image To Image Naive Digital Selfie Avatar AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image naive digital portrait avatar from Image 1: everyday selfie with direct smile, preserving curly dark hair, clear round glasses, thick brows, warm smile, short beard, and lavender hoodie and emphasizing gentle crooked smile and soft direct eyes. Subject: Image 1: everyday selfie with direct smile is the identity-safe selfie anchor. Preserve the most recognizable face shape, expression, hair outline, head angle, and subject identity while simplifying into a square avatar. Scene: Simple square avatar field with pastel blue, cream blue, soft sky blue, or another light solid background; Composition: Fixed 1:1 head-and-shoulders avatar composition: centered face, simplified shoulders, enlarged expression signal, clean readable silhouette, and social-media avatar clarity. Signature Elements: tiny red cheek dots supplies the swappable accent feature detail for this template. Naive flat-color portrait, awkward charming sparse linework, simplified but recognizable facial features, exaggerated expression anchor, small blush, crayon-like digital edges, and square avatar readiness. Style: Naive digital portrait, childlike editorial avatar, simple flat color blocks, primitive portrait, awkward charming linework, minimal crayon portrait, feature-exaggerated avatar, cute caricature, loose minimal lines, and light digital crayon edges. Color Palette: Bright simple avatar palette with warm pink skin, coral red lips, orange nose accent, bright clothing color, soft white highlight, small blush, and calm pastel background. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
